name: FLUX.1 dev-2-pro-full
description: The Flux-Dev2Pro model is a finetuned version of the Flux-Dev transformer, designed to improve the performance of LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) training on the original Flux-Dev model. The LoRA training on Flux-Dev often yields poor results due to the lack of guidance distillation, causing the LoRA training to diverge from the original training process. The Flux-Dev2Pro model addresses this issue by finetuning the Flux-Dev model for many steps, effectively recovering the Flux-Pro model from Flux-Dev. The LoRA trained on Flux-Dev2Pro is reported to yield much better results when applied to Flux-Dev, similar to the performance of LoRA trained on SDXL and applied to SDXL-turbo/lightning.
